title: Complimentary Vanilla
description: I think this mod pack is really good for relaxed survival players like myself making everything more lively. Have fun!
body: this is a pack that adds a lot of vanilla feeling features that honestly should be a thing already.It provides better visuals such as full bright and shaders.It adds to preformance with mods like sodium.It upgrades armour and elytra with do a barlle roll elytra trims armour hud reworked and so on.It makes tolls better such as ading the hammer and giving netherite upgrades.It adds new modles and animations with fresh animations and more.For over all alot of valila feeling add ons to minecraft.I think this mod pack is really good for relaxed survival players like myself although I would not recommend it for creative.
